title: Bariatric Surgery Pre-Authorization вЂ” Extended Assessment
description: Comprehensive prior authorization questionnaire for bariatric surgery candidates. Covers patient demographics, BMI calculation, comorbidities, prior treatment attempts, psychological assessment, medical clearances, and surgical preferences.

item.text: Were you overweight as a child?
Number of supervised diet attempts (past 5 years)
Total months of supervised diet participation
Completed a medically supervised weight loss program?
History of eating disorder (binge eating, bulimia, anorexia)?
Date of most recent comprehensive labs
